name: Third Gen Loan Co., Inc.
description_short: Family-owned Texas lender offering installment loans up to $1,600 with 6-12 month terms and same-day funding. Licensed by the Texas Office of Consumer Credit Commissioner and reports to all three credit bureaus.
description_long:
Third Gen Loans Co., Inc. is a family-owned and operated lender based in Houston, Texas, with over 25 years of history dating back to 1997. The company has expanded from serving Houston residents to offering services across the entire state of Texas, covering over 100 cities and towns. The founders emphasize their deep community roots, having resided in the greater Houston area for four generations, and position themselves as providing alternative lending solutions during financial crises.

The company specializes in personal installment loans ranging from $300 to $1,600 with repayment terms between 6 and 12 months, offering same-day funding upon approval. They charge a flat rate of $4 per every $100 borrowed, which they market as significantly cheaper than payday loans (claiming their loans cost 10X less). Third Gen Loans explicitly states they are not a payday lender, title loan company, or title loan company, and advertises loan approval in as little as 30 minutes. They offer starter loans, signature loans, and small monthly payment installment loans.

What distinguishes Third Gen Loans is their emphasis on credit-building through their reporting to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion), which borrowers can use to establish, rebuild, or improve their credit profiles. They are regulated by the State of Texas Office of Consumer Credit Commissioner, and they emphasize transparent pricing with no hidden fees, fine print, or variable rates. All customers receive the same interest rate regardless of creditworthiness. The company positions itself as ideal for first-time borrowers and those seeking credit improvement rather than simply accessing emergency cash.

As a personal installment lender, Third Gen Loans fills a niche between payday lenders and traditional bank loans, with realistic loan caps and reasonable terms. However, borrowers should note that the maximum loan amount ($1,600) is relatively modest, and the flat fee structure means rates may be less competitive for higher loan amounts. The company's web presence and available information is limited to basic marketing claims without third-party reviews or regulatory complaint data visible in the provided content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Flat transparent pricing at $4 per $100 borrowed with no hidden fees or variable rates
Same-day funding with loan approval in as little as 30 minutes
Loan terms of 6-12 months provide more flexible repayment than typical payday loans
Reports to all three major credit bureaus to help borrowers build credit history
Licensed and regulated by Texas Office of Consumer Credit Commissioner
Family-owned and operated with 25+ years in business (since 1997)
Serves over 100 Texas cities and towns, not limited to Houston
cons: Maximum loan amount of $1,600 is modest compared to other personal loan lenders
Limited online presence and no visible third-party reviews or ratings on the provided website
No information about credit score requirements or eligibility criteria for approval
Flat fee structure means the effective APR may not be competitive for larger loans within their range
Geographic limitation to Texas residents only
best_for: First-time borrowers with no or minimal credit history seeking to establish credit
Texas residents needing $300-$1,600 for short-term financial needs with affordable monthly payments
Individuals wanting to rebuild credit through on-time loan payments reported to credit bureaus
Borrowers seeking a transparent alternative to payday lenders with longer repayment terms
diagnosis: Third Gen Loans is best for Texas residents with limited credit history or those seeking to rebuild credit who need $300-$1,600 and can commit to 6-12 month payment terms. The main caveat is that the maximum loan amount is relatively modest, geographic service is limited to Texas, and borrowers should verify the effective APR to ensure competitiveness with other personal loan options, especially for smaller loan amounts.
services: Loan approval in as little as 30 minutes
Credit bureau reporting to all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2040 N Loop W Ste. 335, Houston, TX 77018
